top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE strftime('%Y', CreationDate) IN ('2010', '2011');

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE strftime('%Y', CreationDate) IN ('2010', '2011');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE CreationDate >= '2010-01-01' AND CreationDate <= '2011-12-31';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 4) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE CreationDate >= '2010-01-01' AND CreationDate < '2012-01-01';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE strftime('%Y', CreationDate) IN ('2010', '2011');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
    COUNT(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE CreationDate >= '2010-01-01' AND CreationDate <= '2011-12-31';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 4) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE CreationDate >= '2010-01-01' AND CreationDate < '2012-01-01';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) /
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', CreationDate) = '2011' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio_2010_to_2011
FROM votes
WHERE strftime('%Y', CreationDate) IN ('2010', '2011');
